zh.lifeSummary: 當Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon於1392年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr26歲，母親Isabella Wadham25歲。他於1417年與Margaret Champernowne在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1428年在英國戴文被列為sheriff of devonshire。他去世於1444年5月12日在英國英格蘭戴文享年52歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon于1392年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr26岁，母亲Isabella Wadham25岁。他于1417年与Margaret Champernowne在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1428年在英国戴文被列为sheriff of devonshire。他去世于1444年5月12日在英国英格兰戴文享年52岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon was born in 1392, in Devon, England, his father, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, was 26 and his mother, Isabella Wadham, was 25. He married Margaret Champernowne in 1417, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. In 1428, his occupation is listed as sheriff of devonshire in Devon, England. He died on 12 May 1444, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon est né en 1392, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella Wadham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Champernowne en 1417, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. En 1428, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devonshire à Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1444, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon 1392 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr 26 und seine Mutter Isabella Wadham 25. Er hat 1417 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Margaret Champernowne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1428 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of devonshire in Devon, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Mai 1444 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon è nato il nel 1392 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Wadham, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Champernowne nel 1417, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1428, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of devonshire nel Devon, England. Morì il 12 maggio 1444, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sheriff Robert Hill of Devonが1392年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Srは26歳，母Isabella Wadhamは25歳であった。1417年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMargaret Champernowneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1428年，イギリスデボンでの職業はsheriff of devonshireと記録されている。彼は1444年5月12日にイギリスイギリスデボンで52歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon(이)가 1392년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Wadham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Margaret Champernowne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1428년, 그의 직업은 영국 데폰에서 sheriff of devonshire이었다. 그는 1444년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

mn.Spaxton, Somersetshire: Spaxton, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon nasceu em 1392, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Wadham, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Champernowne em 1417, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1428, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devonshire em Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1444, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon родился в 1392 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Wadham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Champernowne в 1417 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1428 году он работал по профессии sheriff of devonshire в местности девон, Англия. Он умер 12 мая 1444 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.

sm.1428-1429: mai le 1428 e o'o I le 1429

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon nació en 1392, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabella Wadham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Champernowne en 1417, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1428, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devonshire en Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1444, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra.
